title: Boston Whaler Cooler Chocks
description: CNC-machined HDPE replacement chocks for Boston Whaler 15-17ft center console coolers. Drop-in fit replaces the original wooden chocks that rot, warp, and fail over time. UV-stable, non-absorbent, and built to last.
story: This cooler chock was designed by Caleb Fisher who has since passed away.
